docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $786.80 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA CECILIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY RUBIO RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA CECILIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA CECILIO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA CECILIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBIO RAMIRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA CECILIO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,038.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO CECILIO GARCIA RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
